rule rsa_modulus
{
	meta:
		Author = "NCCIC trusted 3rd party"

		Incident = "10135536"
		Date = "2018/04/19"
		category = "hidden_cobra"
		family = "n/a"
		description = "n/a"

	strings:
		$n = "bc9b75a31177587245305cd418b8df78652d1c03e9da0cfc910d6d38ee4191d40"

	condition:
		( uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and uint16( uint32( 0x3c ) ) == 0x4550 ) and any of them
}
